---
name: New sound suggestion
about: Propose adding a new preset sound
labels: enhancement, assets
---

**Sound name** (zh / en)


**Category** (vehicles / nature / animals / instruments / household / ambience)


**CC0 source URL** (Freesound preferred; Wikimedia Commons CC0 also OK)


**Why would kids enjoy this?**


---

Reminders:
- All preset sounds must be **CC0** or **CC BY 4.0** with attribution. We
  cannot accept CC BY-SA / CC BY-NC / CC BY-ND (incompatible with our MIT
  redistribution).
- Per-file attribution lives in `public/assets/LICENSES.json`. Run
  `npm run audio:audit` before sending a PR — CI will reject anything that
  fails this check.
